rationale: Abstract X articulates a more specific and falsifiable knowledge gap (do cellular atrial changes precede overt cardiomyopathy?), maintains better certainty calibration in its conclusions, and communicates the mechanistic findings more completely without overclaiming causation.
loser_weakness: Abstract Y's gap statement was too generic ('mechanisms remain unknown') and its conclusion overstated causation ('drives atrial arrhythmia') beyond what the translational iPSC and computational design can establish.
